center.name: Spitzkoppe
center.summary: Spitzkoppe是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Monteiro's hornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Monteiro's hornbill (Tockus monteiri) is a species of hornbill that is native to the dry woodlands of southwestern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Monteiro's hornbill (Tockus monteiri) is a species of hornbill that is native to the dry woodlands of southwestern Africa
